title: Marathon Digital Holdings Announces Bitcoin Production and Mining Operation Updates for April 2024
text: In April 2024, Marathon increased its average operational hash rate 15% to 21.1 exahash and increased bitcoin production 21% to 850 bitcoin. The company achieved an all-time operating hash rate high of 25.9 exahash in April. Marathon energized approximately 14,000 additional miners (c. 2.0 EH/s) in April, 9,500 of which were successfully relocated from Ellendale to Garden City. The operating fleet increased to approximately 240,000 Bitcoin miners, theoretically capable of producing 29.9 EH/s. As of April 30, 2024 the company held a total of 17,631 unrestricted BTC demonstrating strong operational momentum.
